EXECUTIVE
SUMMARY
OPPORTUNITY: Christian Full-Service Advertising Agency
ASKING PRICE: $2.5 Million
LOCATION: Raleigh, NC Metro Area LEASE: $1,100 month
ASSETS Revenue: $ 1,327,000
Cashflow: $ 408,000
Goodwill: Included
FF&E: Included
OVERVIEW
This Christian Full-Service Advertising Agency aims to help mission-driven
organizations worldwide to connect with people who share similar values and interests.
It has enabled Christian-led companies to communicate a vision given by God to the
world for more than 22 years!
The Company’s core services include consulting, brand strategy, marketing, and
advertising campaigns for digital, print, radio, and television. Their production services
are focused on social media, video, web development, and graphic design. The
Company uses faith-based themes and values to promote products, services, and ideas.
The Company has extensive expertise in organizational health, organizational
development, marketing, and branding, which provides a stable foundation to build
clients’ visions into reality.
Through its services, the Company ensures that each client's specific goals are
addressed and pursued. The Company is large enough in scope to respond to the most
demanding projects for organizations of all sizes, while remaining highly-agile and
versatile.

PRODUCTS and SERVICES
Digital Marketing:
• This Company employs a solution-focused consulting model to help clients and
organizations achieve their vision, mission, and core values through its branded
and certified process.
• The Company is very passionate about strategy and internet marketing. It
combines SEO, paid advertising, media buying, website design and development,
plus digital marketing.
• The Company adopts a consulting strategy that prioritizes collaboration with
clients, in contrast to the educative stance commonly associated with traditional
consulting models.
• Recognizing the absence of universally applicable solutions for specific problems
that can be applied to all individuals and organizations, this Company stresses
the importance of creating collaborative consulting relationships.
• By acknowledging its expertise in creating a context for change, this Company
stresses that clients are the experts of their own domains, both professional and
personal, and often have a good sense of what has or has not worked in the past
and what might work in the future.
Digital Media Buying:
• This Company maximizes the value of clients' media buying budget by leveraging
its long-term relationships, media buying power, and experience in working with
media that upholds, shares, and promotes Christian values.
• Traditional Broadcast Outlets – This Company helps clients get the most
impressions from their key demographic, maximize their budget by following the
cost per thousand buying model, and strategically connecting clients with
traditional broadcast outlets that uphold Christian values.
• Longform Broadcast Management – This Company helps clients maximize the
return on television broadcasts through precise placement on the right weekly
network and lowering media buying costs.
• Online Media Buying – This Company creates clarity in clients’ online, social,
and digital advertising, as well as helping them sort through the confusion and
noise of the digital jargon, ensuring their messaging aligns with their faith-based
principles. They help their clients grow their reach in the digital ecosystem and
guides them through ad messaging, buying, and optimizing.

Web Design:
• This Company’s tailored web design services are built around the goal of helping
clients and their business to grow. The Company creates tailored designs,
powerful content, effective UX, and optimizes points in each client’s journey so
that their business can grow.
• This Company’s goal is to help clients explain what their business offers to end
users. It is a process that takes time, but the Company has successfully done this
on numerous occasions, in a wide variety of industries across the world, and
adheres to proven strategies that provide trackable growth and results.
SEO Services:
• Organic Traffic – Organic traffic is the lifeblood of any successful website and
business for that matter. It is made up of people who use google search and click
on website. This Company can help direct traffic to clients’ websites from google
search by providing snippets and schema markup to help separate their brand
from competitors.
• Paid Traffic – With Google Ads, this Company can promote clients’ websites on
Google search with keywords they want to show up for, to help boost traffic to
their website. They can also put these ads on other high visibility websites to
further drive targeted traffic to clients’ websites.
• On-page SEO – Structuring content on the website helps Google crawl their
website better. This means that it is more likely that Google will rank clients’
websites higher on their specified keywords. This Company provides services
that help them take out the guesswork of SEO and get them ranked higher on
Google.
• Keyword Tracking – Keywords are used to search the topics on Google. This
Company researches and provides different keywords so that their website can
be better optimized. They can track these keywords on clients’ websites, so the
clients can see progress on google search.
• Monthly Reporting – This Company provides insight and Key Performance
Indicators (KPIs) to help visualize and increase the growth of clients’ online
presence in a consistent manner. They also provide insights on the competition
and adjusts plans to increase their clients’ brand awareness.
• Content Marketing – This Company can promote clients’ blogs or their services
with other trustworthy sites to help boost their authority on Google search. The
Company can do this by sending content through social media platforms such as
Facebook, Instagram, or connecting Google ads display network to help increase
clients’ brand visibility.

KEY INVESTMENT CONSIDERATIONS
Adding additional Account Managers (both Inside & Outside) will be the fastest path
to increase sales.
Increasing the Google Ad Spend budget will provide more leads that can be converted
into clients with the additional bandwidth created by the additional Account Managers.
SALES AND MARKETING
Value-Based Marketing is at the core for this Company, and it is one of only a
few Christian marketing agencies that helps companies in holding media
companies accountable by advising their clients how to allocate their
advertising budgets.
The Company does operate a website and has social media representation.
This Company is one of the Top 5 Trusted Christian Ad Agencies in the World.
Sales grew by 37% in 2023.
50% of clients come from referrals and 50% of clients come from Google searches.
The Company’s God inspired 7-step process allows Christian CEOs to gather data
quickly by exposing specific gaps that need to be addressed. These areas range from
employee engagement to effective vision, strategy, brand execution, and
communication.
1. Destiny – Meeting with clients to see what makes them unique and what they
want to achieve.
2. Vision – Outlining the vision, to provide a wider picture of where the company
is going.
3. Strategy – Identifying key growth goals and defining strategy to achieve these
goals.
4. Brand – Defining the company’s brand personality.
5. Communicate – Picking the best method and medium for communicating the
company’s vision.
6. Think – Adjusting the defined strategy and staying flexible in the ever-changing
environment.

7. Action - Executing a defined strategy, branding, and marketing campaign.
FF&E / INVENTORY
Office Equipment / Computers
Detailed list to be provided for qualified Buyers
CUSTOMERS
• Christian-led companies worldwide
• >500 Accounts worldwide over the past 22+ years
• $45,000 = Average Lifetime Value per Customer
• 27 Months = Average Lifetime Duration per Customer
• $1,700 per month = Average Customer Monthly Retainer
• 15-20 Leads generated per month
• 25% Lead Conversion Rate
BRIGHT OUTLOOK
Expanding Market Niche: This Company will benefit from the increasing demand
for value-based marketing, and is expected to witness an increase in the number of
clients and profits, all while promoting Christian values.
Invest in Innovation and Faith: This Company will continue investing in additional
tools and technologies that will help it improve the effectiveness of marketing
campaigns intended to spread the Word of God.
Grow while Making a Difference: This Company enables Christian-led companies
to make a difference in the world by using faith-based values and communicating a
vision given by God to the world.

Increasing Marketing Efforts: This Company is currently in the early stages of its
growth trajectory and is well-positioned to generate a large pipeline of projects, by
broadening its marketing and sales efforts. It’s team is able to manage the workload
resulting from increased investment in sales campaigns.
LOCATION
980 SF Office Space leased @ $1,100 per month. The Company has resided at this
location since 2008.
PERMITS AND LICENSES
N/A
FINANCIAL INSIGHTS
A complete overview will be offered to qualified Buyers after a LOI has been signed.
INDUSTRY: Advertising Agencies NAICS CODE: 541810
Advertising Agencies Industry Highlights:
Advertising agencies play a crucial role in the modern marketing landscape, serving as
intermediaries between businesses seeking to promote their products or services and
the target audience they aim to reach. Here's an overview of the advertising agency
industry:

• Role and Function: Advertising agencies are professional services firms that
create, plan, and execute advertising campaigns on behalf of their clients. They
offer a range of services, including market research, media planning and buying,
creative development, campaign execution, and performance measurement.
• Services Offered: These agencies offer a wide array of services tailored to meet
the diverse needs of their clients. This includes traditional advertising channels
such as print, television, radio, and outdoor advertising, as well as digital
advertising services like social media marketing, search engine marketing,
content creation, and influencer partnerships.
• Creative Expertise: A key aspect of advertising agencies is their creative talent.
They employ professionals such as copywriters, graphic designers, art directors,
and creative directors who collaborate to develop compelling and effective
advertising campaigns that resonate with the target audience.
• Market Research and Strategy: Advertising agencies conduct market research
to understand consumer behavior, market trends, and competitor activity. This
research informs the development of strategic advertising campaigns that are
designed to achieve the client's objectives and deliver measurable results.
• Media Planning and Buying: Agencies help clients identify the most effective
media channels to reach their target audience and negotiate advertising
placements to maximize the impact of their campaigns while optimizing budget
allocation.
• Digital Transformation: With the proliferation of digital media, advertising
agencies have increasingly shifted their focus towards digital advertising
channels. This includes online display ads, video ads, social media advertising,
and mobile marketing, reflecting the evolving preferences and behaviors of
consumers.
• Measurement and Analytics: Advertising agencies utilize data and analytics
tools to measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns and provide clients
with insights into key performance metrics such as reach, engagement,
conversion rates, and return on investment (ROI). This data-driven approach
enables agencies to optimize campaigns in real-time and deliver maximum value
to their clients.

• Client Relationships: Building and maintaining strong relationships with
clients is essential for advertising agencies. They work closely with clients to
understand their business objectives, target audience, and brand identity,
ensuring that advertising campaigns align with the client's overall marketing
strategy.
• Industry Trends: The advertising industry is constantly evolving, driven by
changes in consumer behavior, technology advancements, and emerging trends.
Key trends shaping the industry include the rise of influencer marketing, the
growing importance of data-driven advertising, the impact of mobile and video
advertising, and the increasing demand for personalized and immersive brand
experiences.
• Challenges and Opportunities: Advertising agencies face various challenges,
including competition from in-house marketing teams, pressure to demonstrate
ROI, and the need to adapt to rapid technological changes. However, they also
have opportunities to innovate, differentiate their services, and expand into new
markets to stay competitive in the dynamic advertising landscape.
REASON FOR SELLING
God has called the Seller to pursue a different business venture. The Seller is looking
for the right buyer to take what has been built and to grow it to the next level.
CONTACT: Mike Kachin 803-992-2148 mikekachin@ProNovaPartners.com
THE FINE PRINT
Instructions for Submission of an LOI
ProNova Partners is happy to accept a letter of intent drafted by an IP, an advisor, or counsel. If you
would like to work with an Advisor to draft the language of the Letter of Intent, simply let the
engagements Advisor (as per the signature block at the bottom of this document) know that you are
interested in submitting an offer. We will work with you to craft the language of the letter and begin
to facilitate negotiations with the Seller and define terms all parties can agree upon. The ProNova

Partners team specializes in finding common ground between Buyers and Sellers and strives for
friendly negotiations based on open communication.
Binding LOI Grants Universal Due Diligence Access
Due diligence may begin upon the execution of a Letter of Intent. Upon execution of an LOI, the
Owner agrees to provide the Buyer and Buyer's Advisors universal access to all required documents,
reports, data, and extended site visits and privileges to the respective party with 360s of
understanding of the Business, (less comprehensive customer identities). Buyer and/or Buyer's
Advisors shall provide a checklist with the LOI of any and all anticipated due diligence requests so
that ProNova, in tandem with Seller's counsel, can coordinate items that are not already pre-
populated within ProNova’s data inventory.
We look forward to continuing discussions to answer any questions you may have and
to guide you to a successful LOI for the Seller’s consideration.
Pending Disputes
Seller reports, to the best of his/her knowledge, there are no past, present, or pending legal disputes
involving the Company a prudent Buyer need be aware of.
Call to Action
Since the Business presented herein delivers a ripe and rare opportunity with significant assets,
ProNova firmly believes there will quickly be many serious prospects considering the acquisition of
this Agency for themselves or for their portfolios. Time is of the essence.
Buyer Qualification
An initial conversation is required with the Advisor to determine the interest level, potential fit, and
financial viability of a path to closing for each potential Buyer of this engagement. Only after this
initial conversation and the establishment of a path forward via a review of financial qualifications
will the Advisor release the name of the Company and schedule an initial meet and greet with the
Sellers.
Site Visits
A site visit, the cost of which will be borne solely by Interested Parties, can be scheduled to facilitate
an additional assessment of the Agency. IPs acknowledge and agree to conduct site visits only during
designated, agreed-upon hours based on the exclusive discretion and instruction of the Seller via
communication through the Advisor. Seller reserves the right to restrict site visits to serious, pre-
qualified Parties that have or will quickly present an LOI or offer.
Seller's Discretionary Deposit Requirement to Execute APA

The Seller individually or upon the advice of counsel may or may not require a reasonable security
deposit prior to execution of a binding, exclusive and definitive Asset Purchase Agreement.
"Reasonable deposit" shall not exceed 10.0% of the final purchase price paid to Seller as agreed
via an APA.
The initial deposit, to be held in ProNova’s Trust or in a mutually agreed upon Escrow, will be in
accordance with the terms and conditions of the APA. Interested Parties may abandon the
transaction after reviewing the deposit mandate. Conversely, Seller reserves the right to refuse to
engage in a binding agreement without said deposit.
DISCLAIMER NOTICE
ProNova Partners, Inc. (hereinafter referred to as "ProNova" or "Advisor") has been contracted as a Sell-Side
Advisor to assist the Seller in the anticipated divestiture of this company.
The sole purpose of this Executive Summary, (hereinafter referred to as "Summary" or "CIM or “CBR"), has
been prepared by ProNova to assist the recipient in making a purchasing decision and the subsequent submission
of either a "Letter of Intent" (hereinafter referred to as "LOI") or an Asset Purchase Agreement (hereinafter
known as APA), for the eventual procurement of the Company.
This document is without regard to specific objectives, suitability, financial situations, or needs of any particular
person or investment group. Receipt of this information is not exclusive nor puts the receiver in a prioritized
position of succession until an LOI or APA is received by ProNova. Nothing contained in this document shall
form the basis of or be relied upon in connection with any contract or commitment whatsoever.
The information in this Memorandum is based on the information provided to ProNova from the Seller; from

the content crafted by ProNova, yet ProNova has not independently verified any of the contents. Further, the

While the statements in this Memorandum have been expressed in good faith and the information herein or in

Neither ProNova, its directors, employees, agents, assigns, representatives; The Company, nor the Owner shall be

This document, divided into chapters & sub-sections for the purpose of reading convenience, is neither all-

By accepting a copy of this CIM, the recipient accepts the terms of this Disclaimer Notice, which forms an
